ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-14-2002 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE JUL-05-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CBSJ FINANCIAL CORP. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OSORIO, WILLIAM $14,540.27 PRINCIPAL, $660.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $1,400.00 INTEREST, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $16,645.27, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
